text: Hatches on the life boat are designed such that?

options.text: A) Watertight and can be opened and closed from both sides
B) Watertight and can be opened and closed from only inside
D) Bolted type with watertight capabilities

explanation: Hatches on enclosed lifeboats are critical for maintaining buoyancy and protection from elements. Regulations require them to be watertight and designed so they can be operated effectively from both the inside and the outside.
